description_long: This object is a modern tactical shotgun with a streamlined, angular design and a matte finish. It features a long, cylindrical barrel with a prominent magazine protruding below the receiver, suggesting a semi-automatic or magazine-fed configuration. The stock is full and straight, with a slight taper and a textured butt for shoulder support. The pistol grip is integrated into the stock, providing ergonomic handling, and the trigger guard is rounded and robust, enclosing the trigger securely. The receiver and fore-end are boxy and solid, with minimal external detailing, emphasizing functionality and durability. The overall appearance is utilitarian, with no visible decorative elements, making it suitable for practical use in urban environments.
description: A modern, matte-finished tactical shotgun with a full stock, long barrel, and prominent magazine. Its design is angular and utilitarian, emphasizing function over decoration.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, including the long barrel, full stock, pistol grip, and protruding magazine.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular barrel opening and the narrow profile of the receiver and stock.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the magazine, trigger guard, and stock details.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the butt of the stock and the alignment of the barrel, with minimal detail visible.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, long and cylindrical with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth, continuous contour and no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
